case_title: IN & OUT PLUMBING VS. TONY LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY IN & OUT PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TONY LEE, YOUSUN SUNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IN & OUT PLUMBING
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF IN & OUT PLUMBING

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HAS ALREADY BEEN ADJUDICATED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT SUNNY YOUSUN LEE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ATEF ABBOS--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO FEB-03-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ATEF ABBOS--CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IN & OUT PLUMBING
